nasb.text: It even magnified itself to be equal with the Commander of the host; and it removed the regular sacrifice from Him, and the place of His sanctuary was thrown down.

esv.text: It became great, even as great as the Prince of the host. And the regular burnt offering was taken away from him, and the place of his sanctuary was overthrown.

cnv.text: 牠狂妄自大，要高及天象之君；牠除掉獻給天象之君的常獻祭，又拆毀他的聖所。

ccb.text: 它狂妄自大，要与天军的统帅比高，它废除日常献给祂的祭，毁坏祂的圣所。
